subheadline: We invest in the things that keep great people healthy, focused, and growing.

perks.title: Full health cover
perks.description: Medical, dental, and vision for you and your family, paid 100% by us.

perks.title: Work from anywhere
perks.description: Remote-first since day one, with a home-office budget and quarterly team weeks.

perks.title: Flexible hours
perks.description: Own your calendar. We care about outcomes, not when you clock in.

perks.title: $2,000 learning budget
perks.description: Spend it on courses, books, or conferences every year, no approvals needed.

perks.title: Meaningful equity
perks.description: Every employee gets stock options and shares in the company we build together.

perks.title: Recharge time
perks.description: Unlimited PTO with a four-week minimum, plus the week between holidays off.
